records.title: Plan an NS train journey
records.description: Use the official NS journey planner to compare departure and arrival times, transfers, platform information and live changes before leaving and again shortly before boarding.
records.ai_summary: Plan door to door and allow time for transfers. Recheck the itinerary shortly before departure because platform assignments, engineering work and disruption advice can change.

records.title: Check railway disruptions and engineering work
records.description: NS publishes current disruptions and scheduled engineering work, including alternative routes and replacement transport advice when normal train services are affected.
records.ai_summary: Check both current incidents and scheduled works for the full route. Follow the operator's alternative travel advice and preserve journey details if the arrival delay may qualify for compensation.

records.title: Check in and out correctly with NS
records.description: Train passengers using a card or travel product must use the correct operator reader at the start and end of travel and may need to switch operators during a transfer.
records.ai_summary: Use the same card or device throughout the journey and verify the display and beep. At an operator change, check out with the first company before checking in with the next.

records.title: Use an NS mobile or printed e-ticket
records.description: An NS e-ticket must be bought before travel, loaded in the official app or printed as instructed, and shown with valid identification when the ticket is personal.
records.ai_summary: Open the ticket in the NS app or carry the valid printout and keep the phone charged. Do not check in with an e-ticket; scan its code only to pass gates and show it during inspection.

records.title: Compare NS season tickets and discounts
records.description: NS season tickets combine travel-on-account with different peak, off-peak, weekend or route-based benefits, so the best option depends on travel frequency and check-in time.
records.ai_summary: Compare the subscription price with expected monthly journeys and read the current time-window rules. Confirm that the chosen product is active before relying on a discount.

records.title: Request compensation for an NS delay
records.description: Passengers whose domestic NS journey arrives late may submit a delay-refund request under the current thresholds and conditions using their ticket or travel-card details.

official_source.title: Refunds for delays on a domestic route

records.ai_summary: Record the planned route, actual arrival and ticket used, then submit the official claim after the journey data becomes available. Different ticket types and international journeys follow different routes.

records.title: Arrange NS Travel Assistance
records.description: Travellers with a disability can request NS Travel Assistance for supported journeys and should check station accessibility, booking conditions and meeting instructions in advance.
records.ai_summary: Check whether both stations support the required assistance and book within the stated notice period. Arrive at the agreed meeting point early and monitor service changes.

records.title: Check station facilities and accessibility
records.description: Official station pages list addresses, opening information, platforms and available facilities such as lifts, toilets, lockers, bicycle storage and service points.
records.ai_summary: Review the departure and transfer stations, especially lift access and walking routes. Allow extra time where construction, a long interchange or limited facilities affect the journey.

records.title: Use NS app journey notifications
records.description: The NS app can notify travellers about delays, cancellations, platform changes, crowd expectations and alternative advice for a saved planned journey.
records.ai_summary: Save the exact journey and enable relevant notifications before departure. Treat alerts as live guidance and reopen the planner when a train is cancelled or a connection becomes uncertain.

records.title: Report or search for property lost on an NS journey
records.description: NS provides a formal process for reporting items lost in trains or at stations and matching them with property handed to staff.
records.ai_summary: Submit a precise description, journey, date and contact details through the official channel. Do not share passwords or unnecessary sensitive data and verify collection instructions before travelling.
